task_description: Build the TCU Market Kitchen Terminal - a fully interactive trading analysis app with candlestick charts, AI coach, journal saving, character lessons, dashboard with user stats, learning roadmap, and proper auth flow. All features must work with demo fallback data when API keys are not configured.

verification.summary: npm run build passes with 0 errors, all 7 required routes compile (/, /auth, /chart-kitchen, /dashboard, /journal, /missions, /roadmap), no hardcoded localhost references found in production code, git commit ready at 855185e.
